name: ContextOps Advisor (Baseline)
roast: This context is practically sparkling. Did you use an industrial sandblaster or just ContextOps?

name: Naive Truncator (Baseline)
roast: Wow, you just cut off the last 60% of the prompt. I guess if you close your eyes, the errors can't hurt you.

name: No-op (Baseline)
roast: You did literally nothing. This is the participation trophy of context optimization.

name: Team Alpha Optimizer
roast: Not bad. You managed to compress it without completely lobotomizing the LLM.

name: TokenCrusher v2
roast: You squeezed this context so hard it's gasping for air, but hey, it's cheap.
